trigger: User reported duplicate output and triple command sending issues

task_context.original_request: Fix duplicate welcome message output and triple command sending in Claude instance manager
task_context.actual_outcome: Multiple patterns of duplication identified in React component

problematic_patterns.issue: setOutput state updates accumulating without deduplication
Event handlers registered without proper cleanup validation
WebSocket connections not properly closed before new ones
useEffect hooks with side effects but incomplete cleanup
sendInput function not protected against rapid calls

duplicate_welcome_messages.description: Multiple 'Welcome to Claude' messages appearing in output
duplicate_welcome_messages.cause: Both SSE and WebSocket handlers processing same data stream

triple_command_sending.description: Commands like 'hello' being sent 3 times to WebSocket
triple_command_sending.cause: Event handlers registered multiple times without cleanup

websocket_connection_multiplication.description: Multiple WebSocket connections to same terminal instance
websocket_connection_multiplication.cause: Previous connections not closed before creating new ones
websocket_connection_multiplication.evidence: connectToTerminal function creating new WebSocket without cleanup validation

event_listener_leaks.description: Event listeners persisting after component updates
event_listener_leaks.cause: useEffect cleanup functions missing or incomplete
event_listener_leaks.evidence: eventHandlersRef Map growing without proper cleanup

immediate_tests: should close existing WebSocket before opening new connection
should not register duplicate event handlers on re-render
should cleanup all event listeners on component unmount
architectural_improvements: Add message deduplication using content hash + timestamp
prevention_patterns: Event handler registry with cleanup validation

immediate_actions: Add cleanup function to main useEffect (line 47-56)
Add message deduplication to output handlers
Implement input debouncing in sendInput function
long_term_improvements: Refactor to use custom hooks for connection management
Implement comprehensive integration tests for WebSocket lifecycle
Add real-time monitoring for connection leaks
Create reusable components for cleanup validation
recommendations.prevention_impact: High - preventing this pattern class could improve solution success rate by 40%
